report.summary: Third standup Apr 2: 30 learn pages on disk (+4 since v2 standup), 21,177 total lines (+14.1%). 20 agent runs today across both workspaces. P0 blocker persists: Day 9+ without deploy, 63 uncommitted files in cryptodegen, Degen0x still has no git repo. Build cadence strong — 4 builds, 4 community, 2 design, 3 EOD cycles completed today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v2): 4 new learn pages detected — total now 30 (up from 26). New additions include CLARITY Act, DeFAI, Stablecoins Explained, DEX Aggregators, and other topics from build cycles v3/v4.

CONTENT VOLUME: 21,177 lines across 30 learn page.tsx files (up from 18,560 — +2,617 lines, +14.1% growth). Top pages by depth: Crypto Tax (1,134 lines), Crypto Cards (1,099), Institutional DeFi (1,097), PayFi (1,013).
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 630 in cryptodegen (unchanged since v2). Degen0x workspace has no published-pages.ts tracking.
OG IMAGE COVERAGE: Design agent ran 2 cycles today — all new pages should have OG SVGs. Audit needed for the 4 newest pages.
SEO PIPELINE: All 30 learn pages have Metadata exports and structured data. No GSC or Vercel Analytics accessible from sandbox.
API HEALTH: 6/6 API routes confirmed healthy by eod-v3 audit. No code changes to API routes this cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: 20 agent reports today across both workspaces (4 cryptodegen + 15 Degen0x + this standup). Agent breakdown: standup×5, build×5, community×5, design×2, eod×3, publish×0.

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: (1) Build v3+v4 created 4 new learn guides. (2) Community v3+v4 extended content calendar through Jun 28 with 329 total tweets drafted. (3) Design v2 created social cards for Stablecoins $309B + F&G Contrarian. (4) EOD v2+v3 ran full QA audits.

P0 BLOCKER (Day 9+, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28 (Mar 24). cryptodegen has 63 uncommitted files. Degen0x workspace has no git repo at all — all 30 learn guides exist only as local files. Requires Jefe to authorize commit+push or git init.
P1 — MISSING SCAFFOLDS: 109 published slugs still lack page.tsx files (17% gap). Unchanged — blocked on deploy pipeline.
P2 — PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 pages still queued (Euler V2, Hyperlane). Blocked on deploy.
P3 — CONTENT CALENDAR: 329 tweets drafted through Jun 28. Newsletter v18 ready. 2 new social card SVGs created. Community pipeline is healthy but nothing can ship without deploy.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL, Day 9+): 30 learn guides, 63 uncommitted files, 329 tweet drafts, 2 queued pages — all stuck locally. This remains the single highest-leverage action. One commit+push unlocks everything. Recommend: batch commit all cryptodegen changes, then address Degen0x git initialization separately.

PRIORITY 2 — CONTENT DEPTH OVER BREADTH: At 30 learn guides and 21K+ lines, the learn section has strong volume. Next build cycles should shift toward scaffolding the 109 missing page.tsx files for already-published slugs — these are pages Google already knows about but that return 404s or fallbacks.

PRIORITY 3 — COMMUNITY ACTIVATION: 329 tweets and 18 newsletters are drafted but can't execute without a live, updated site. When deploy unblocks, the community pipeline has months of content ready to go. Prioritize social launch sequence immediately post-deploy.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,904 (standup×5=$225, build×5=$1165, community×5=$205, design×2=$120, eod×3=$189) — 20 total runs

report.email: Chrome JS fetch to Resend API blocked (CORS/network restriction from browser context) — consistent with all previous cycles
